chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1291 of 2013 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Appl in d/o case For hearing of MA 5234/2023 16-05-2024 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** Petitioner present in person submits that his grievance his been redressed and therefore he does not press listed application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
